2305770.name: PLUNKO - Champion of the Roundlands
2305770.description:
Join Plunko, a bold green ball with a mean left hook, on an exciting adventure through Planet Geo! Life is pretty chill in the Roundlands with Lord Orb keeping things friendly and fun, mostly through epic boxing matches. But then King Trungle storms out of Polygon Valley, bringing trouble and chaos with him. Now it's up to Plunko to save his home!

Master tricky parkour moves and intense boxing battles to become the ultimate "Champion of the Roundlands." Grab some awesome Roundlandian drinks from The Wizard’s vending machines, they're all over the place! (The Wizard is pretty awesome.) Check them out:

  • ENRG Drink: Bounce off walls and speed through levels!

  • Sharp Shooter Cola: Tasty cola that lets you shoot bullets from your fingertips! (Neat.)

  • Healthy Tea: Get your health back and stay in the game longer!

Plunko is packed with colorful pixel art that blends the best of classic platformers with high-speed, action-filled gameplay. Explore cool worlds, fight tough enemies, and uncover secrets that’ll help you defeat King Trungle and save the Roundlands!

Features:

  • Plunko, a tough little circle who packs a punch!

  • Fast-paced parkour and thrilling combat encounters.

  • Drink cola to shoot bullets out of your fingers!

  • Power up with energy drinks to go faster, stronger, and become unstoppable!

  • Rich, vibrant pixel-art worlds inspired by classic games.

  • Take on King Trungle and his Polygonite army in the ultimate showdown!

  • You can also shoot bullets out of your fingers isn't that neat.

Jump into "Plunko - Champion of the Roundlands" and become the hero the Roundlands need! Ready to roll?
2305770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
